checks.description: Guardrail property ensuring no hidden fixed-latency assumptions for boundary-value stimuli.
checks.pass_condition: read_data must not become X or Z and must remain stable across cycles when edge-case inputs are held constant.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge-case stimulus (boundary values) is applied to write_addr, write_data, read_addr, write_en, and read_en.

checks.description: Functional check confirming read_data updates after a write operation.
checks.pass_condition: When read_en is asserted after a write, read_data eventually reflects the value written to the same address.
checks.trigger_condition: After a write operation followed by a read enable on the same address.
